ddls:
CREATE TABLE "time_dimensions" (
  "dimension_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time dimension */,
  "group" TEXT /* Group to which the time dimension belongs (e.g., Time) */,
  "field" TEXT /* Name of the time dimension (e.g., Date, Month) */,
  "id" TEXT /* ID or code for the time dimension */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the time dimension (e.g., Dimension, Measure) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the time dimension */,
  "time_granularity" TEXT /* Granularity of the time dimension (e.g., day, month, year, week) */,
  "is_custom" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the time dimension is custom */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the time dimension */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the time dimension was created */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the time dimension */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the time dimension was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dimension_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conversion_rules" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conversion rule */,
  "source_dimension_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source time dimension */,
  "target_dimension_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target time dimension */,
  "conversion_formula" TEXT /* Formula or method for converting between the time dimensions */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the conversion rule is active */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the conversion rule */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the conversion rule was created */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the conversion rule */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the conversion rule was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conversion_rules_source_dimension_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_dimension_id") REFERENCES time_dimensions ("dimension_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conversion_rules_target_dimension_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_dimension_id") REFERENCES time_dimensions ("dimension_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "formula_definitions" (
  "formula_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each formula */,
  "dimension_id" INTEGER /* ID of the time dimension using the formula */,
  "formula_expression" TEXT /* Expression or formula used for the time dimension */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the formula is active */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the formula */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the formula was created */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the formula */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the formula was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("formula_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_formula_definitions_dimension_id FOREIGN KEY ("dimension_id") REFERENCES time_dimensions ("dimension_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_dimension_values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time dimension value */,
  "dimension_id" INTEGER /* ID of the time dimension */,
  "value" TEXT /* Actual value of the time dimension (e.g., 2023-01-01) */,
  "display_value" TEXT /* Display value of the time dimension (e.g., January 1, 2023) */,
  "time_granularity" TEXT /* Granularity of the time value (e.g., day, month, year, week) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the time value is active */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the time value */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the time value was created */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the time value */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the time value was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_dimension_values_dimension_id FOREIGN KEY ("dimension_id") REFERENCES time_dimensions ("dimension_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_dimension_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "parent_dimension_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent time dimension */,
  "child_dimension_id" INTEGER /* ID of the child time dimension */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the relationship is active */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the relationship */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the relationship was created */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the relationship */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_dimension_relationships_parent_dimension_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_dimension_id") REFERENCES time_dimensions ("dimension_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_dimension_relationships_child_dimension_id FOREIGN KEY ("child_dimension_id") REFERENCES time_dimensions ("dimension_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_dimension_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "dimension_id" INTEGER /* ID of the time dimension */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata (e.g., description, format) */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the metadata entry is active */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the metadata entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the metadata entry was created */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the metadata entry */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the metadata entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_dimension_metadata_dimension_id FOREIGN KEY ("dimension_id") REFERENCES time_dimensions ("dimension_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_dimension_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage event */,
  "dimension_id" INTEGER /* ID of the time dimension */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report or analysis using the time dimension */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date when the time dimension was used */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the time dimension was used */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the usage event is active */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who recorded the usage event */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the usage event was recorded */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the usage event */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the usage event was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_dimension_usage_dimension_id FOREIGN KEY ("dimension_id") REFERENCES time_dimensions ("dimension_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_dimension_usage_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the report is active */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the report */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("email")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date when the user last logged in */,
  "last_password_change_date" TEXT /* Date when the user last changed their password */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
